task_description: Add user-friendly interface settings (Cell 3.5 - Quick Setup Dashboard with presets, resolution shortcuts, difficulty levels) and enable/disable feature toggles (Cell 3.6 - unified toggle panel for all major features) to LTX_PRO.py. Integrate these toggles into generate_pro() so they actually skip phases when disabled.

verification.summary: python3 -m py_compile passes. All ENABLE_* toggles defined and wired. Review v2 verdict: APPROVED.
